input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.7.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.7.2
            TITLE: the voltage being present at the connectors must directly control the voltage indicator using

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.7.2: The voltage being present at the connectors must directly control the Voltage Indicator using
EV.5.7.2 The voltage being present at the connectors must directly control the Voltage Indicator using 
hard wired electronics with no software control.

final_answer: The voltage being present at the connectors must directly control the Voltage Indicator using hard wired electronics with no software control.
